title: Pwnhammer
description: Changes the Mace texture into the Pwnhammer from Terraria.
body:
Changes the Mace into the pre-1.3.1 Pwnhammer sprite from Terraria. (pronounced: pone-hammer) Now you can pwn things! In addition, this pack renames the Mace to 'Pwnhammer' in English. This should work on any minecraft version that has maces. Enjoy!

![Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/140d228c80cea110a4db4cb987afb402345c74e3.png)
